title: tilia corallina
intro: Tilia corallina, also known as the small-leaved lime, is a deciduous tree species native to Southeastern Europe and the Balkans. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Tilia corallina include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. Tilia corallina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried flowers, which are often used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal preparations.
